narrative: Trade #4 entered long on BTC_USDT at $64,750 on 2025-10-18 08:00 after SMA(10) crossed above SMA(30) with a widening spread — a strong trend-onset signal. RSI(14) at 42 from oversold gave room to run. Exited at $65,810 (+1.63%) when the fast SMA rolled back below slow, a textbook trail-stop pattern.
